Import TensorFlow, NumPy and the TNExpandCondense class from tn_expand_condense_test.py
Define a random seed for reproducibility using np.random.seed(42)
Create a batch size of 100 and input dimension of (768, 6)
Generate random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, input_dim)
Call the _build_model function to create a sequential model
Compile the model using Adam optimizer, binary_crossentropy loss and accuracy metric
Train the model for 5 epochs with a batch size of 32 on the generated data
Verify that the loss decreases and accuracy increases during training by asserting conditions like history.history['loss'][0] > history.history['loss'][-1]
Monitor GPU memory usage during the training process
